name: ANI
short_description: Liam wakes up alone after surgery. He walks around the facility and sees what happened while he was unconscious.
detailed_description:
ANI is a storytelling game with thriller, choice-making, and science-fiction elements.

Liam has to undergo surgery in a facility located in a deserted area. After the surgery, he wakes up alone and explores the facility to find Chloe. During his journey, he experiences the memories of objects and realizes that this facility is not an ordinary facility and experiences a series of adventures.

  • Memory-Stacked Objects

Experience your memories by interacting with diaries and objects that have memories.

  • Explore the Facility

Something is wrong in this facility. Survive and solve the mystery of this facility while exploring this facility.

  • Survivors

Ask the people you encounter during your journey to help you.

  • Unkillable Monsters

There is no way to kill the monsters in this facility. Try to stay away from the monsters.
